notable_excerpts: L&T is committed to environmental targets including a decrease in the intensity of freshwater withdrawal and emissions of greenhouse gases.
L&T's long-term sustainability goals of achieving water neutrality by 2035 and carbon neutrality by 2040.
L&T Energy GreenTech has won the bid to Build, Own and Operate a 10-KTPA green hydrogen plant for Indian Oil Corporation.
The issue is not exactly of labor availability, the issue is of the churn within a year.
Retraining costs and bringing a new set of people has an impact.
Better construction methods are being deployed to improve execution ramp up.
L&T achieved a significant milestone by becoming the 'First Indian Corporate' to issue an ESG Bond under the SEBI’s newly introduced ESG and sustainability linked bond framework.
Our group order inflows for Q1 registers a YoY growth of 33%.
The order book as of June ‘25 is at Rs.6.13 trillion, up 25% as compared to June ‘24.

chain_of_thought: L&T demonstrates strong environmental commitments with clear targets for carbon and water neutrality. Social aspects focus on labor management and training, while governance highlights include transparency in financial reporting and strategic ESG initiatives.
strengths: Strong order book and financial transparency
weaknesses: Lower EBITDA margins in some segments
